steps.title: Write the perimeter
steps.content: The rectangle has length $x+28$ and width $x$, so its perimeter is $$2(x+28)+2x=4x+56$$

steps.title: Translate at least
steps.content: The phrase at least 456 means the perimeter is greater than or equal to $456$: $$4x+56\geq456$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D — $4x + 56 \geq 456$ has the correct perimeter expression and the correct inequality direction, so D is correct.
